config.EnabledBuildings.name: Enabled Buildings
config.EnabledBuildings.desc: Change which buildings from this mod are available
buildings.Alveary.name: Alveary
buildings.Alveary.desc: Home for a large hive of bees. Produces honey every day for every nearby flower.
buildings.LightningRod.name: Lightning Attractor
buildings.LightningRod.desc: A metal tower capable of absorbing an entire storm. Catches all lightning strikes.
buildings.FieldStone.name: Field Stone
buildings.FieldStone.desc: An enchanted stone which improves nearby crops and prevents soil from drying out.
buildings.Stockpile.name: Stockpile
buildings.Stockpile.desc: A building that stores a large amount of items
buildings.BigStockpile.name: Big Stockpile
buildings.BigStockpile.desc: A building that stores a huge amount of items
buildings.DeluxeStockpile.name: Deluxe Stockpile
buildings.DeluxeStockpile.desc: A building that stores a truly colossal amount of items
buildings.OminousEffigy.name: Ominous Effigy
buildings.OminousEffigy.desc: A reservoir of sinister magic that frightens all birds away from your farm
buildings.MagicPond.name: Magic Pond
buildings.MagicPond.desc: An enchanted pool from which any fish can be caught
